Class Animal

java.lang.Object
animals.Animal
Direct Known Subclasses:
Cat, Dog, Mouse
public abstract class Animal extends Object
Abstract class representing a generic Animal.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Animal()
    Constructor to initialize an animal with default values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getLocation()
    Gets the location of the animal.
    String
    getSpecies()
    Gets the species of the animal.
    boolean
    isAlive()
    Checks if the animal is alive.
    void
    kill()
    Kills the animal, setting its alive status to false.
    abstract void
    makeSound()
    Makes the animal produce its characteristic sound.
    void
    revive()
    Revives the animal, setting its alive status to true.
    void
    setLocation(int location)
    Sets the location of the animal.
    void
    setSpecies(String species)
    Sets the species of the animal.

  • Method Details

    • kill

      public void kill()
      Kills the animal, setting its alive status to false.

    • revive

      public void revive()
      Revives the animal, setting its alive status to true.

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Checks if the animal is alive.
      Returns:
      true if the animal is alive, false otherwise

    • setSpecies

      public void setSpecies(String species)
      Sets the species of the animal.
      Parameters:
      species - the species to set

      public void setLocation(int location)
      Sets the location of the animal.
      Parameters:
      location - the location to set

      Gets the species of the animal.

      public int getLocation()
      Gets the location of the animal.
      Returns:

    • makeSound

      public abstract void makeSound()
      Makes the animal produce its characteristic sound.
